description: Yoga Nidra for deep rest, connection, nervous system healing, and better sleep. Welcome dear one, I'm Kristyn Rose. This channel offers guided Yoga Nidra, nervous system regulation practices, and mindfulness tools to help you find deep rest, emotional balance, nervous system regulation, healing, mindfulness, and connection to yourself. Yoga Nidra is an ancient meditation practice that helps your body rest deeply while your awareness stays gently awake, supporting healing, restoration, and inner connection. If you often feel overwhelmed, anxious, or mentally exhausted, you’re in the right place. These practices are designed to help your body soften out of stress and return to a sense of safety, calm, and clarity. New practices every week. If you’d like to go deeper, visit my website and join my email community: www.kristynroseyoga.ca I'm so grateful you are here, sharing with you that which I truly love. May this space support your journey back to yourself.

description: Hallo ihr Lieben, Ich bin Charan Amrit Kaur und habe vor 6 Jahren begonnen meine große Leidenschaft zu teilen: das Kundalini Yoga, Meditation und auch die Sat Nam Rasayan Heilung. Ich bin zertifizierte Yoga-Lehrerin, Heilerin und Rohkostchefin. Das erste Mal habe ich tatsächlich vor 20 Jahren Kundalini Yoga praktiziert und es war Liebe auf den ersten Blick. Die Wirkung auf Körper, Geist und Seele ist unbeschreiblich. Nach einer Stunde fühlt man sich geklärt, ruhig, gelassen und mit seiner Seele verbunden. Die Praxis hat mein Leben so bereichert und meine Entwicklung in allen Bereichen gefördert. Meine Mission ist es die Werkzeuge und die Praxis mit möglichst vielen Menschen zu teilen. Es ist wunderbar für alle Yoga-Anfänger, wie auch für Fortgeschrittene. Tiefe Heilung wird möglich und somit auch wahre Potentialsentfaltung. Viel Freude auf meinem Kanal! Mehr Infos zur Live Praxis findest du hier: www.charan-amrit-kaur.de/yoga-tribe/ Sat Nam!

description: Yoga practices and teaching for people who want to go a little deeper. I'm Gem Maryan, E-RYT 500 and yoga therapist in training (C-IAYT). On this channel you'll find Yin yoga, Ashtanga, Vinyasa, restorative practice, yoga nidra, meditation and chair yoga for older adults and people with limited mobility. My teaching is rooted in anatomy, nervous system awareness and somatic research. Not yoga as performance. Yoga as a precision tool for working with real bodies, in real life. This channel sits alongside my work at Deeside Yoga Institute, where I offer advanced teacher training in Yin, Restorative and Somatic practice, and one-to-one yoga therapy sessions. ____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ Find me here: Website and training: deesideyogainstitute.com Monthly writing: inayame81.substack.com Free resources: deesideyogainstitute.com/freeresources Enquiries: deesideyogainstitute@gmail.com

description: 👋​ Hi nice to meet you! I'm Irene, a vinyasa krama yoga teacher. 🧘‍♀️I'm passionate about teaching yoga in a step-by-step approach that is tailored to you as an individual. We are all unique and have different needs, goals, and preferences. Therefore, what works for one person might not be suitable for another. ​🤸🏽‍♀️​I teach beginners and more experienced yoga practitioners personalised vinyasa krama yoga, pranayama breathing techniques, and mindfulness meditation practices. Giving you the tools to be able to develop and maintain your own home yoga practice that helps you find more balance in your body and mind. ​🧑‍💻​I also teach chair yoga, mindfulness meditation, and special yoga classes for companies and organisations that are focused on reducing stress and using yoga stretches to help release tension in the neck, shoulders, and back. 🙏🏿​ Visit www.antarayoga.nl for more information.
